title: sedum ochroleucum var. montanum
intro: Sedum ochroleucum var. montanum, also known as Mountain White-leaved Sedum, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties, which help to relieve congestion and soothe the throat. The herbal preparations of Sedum ochroleucum var. montanum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
